problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: If Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
